transcript: Speaker A: Only give five star rating. Speaker B: Can you give me a five star rating? Speaker A: Ani cheppali. Meru eppudu alochisthunaru kadha, E rapido vadu matladuthundo aanesi. English meeru aapudey nechukogalaru, Yappud ayithe me aanthata mere practice cheygaltharo. Nenu speak X app lo English nerchukuntupanu. Mana mistakes cheppadaniki kuda yavro okati undali kadha. Aandhuke na work complete ayipoyina tharvatha, Nenu speak X app lo AI teacher dwara english nerchukuntunanu. Speak X meku english nerchukovadaniki chala help chesthundhi. Endhukante ekada AI teacher manalani judge kuda cheyadhu, Aadhi mana mistakes ni kuda correct chesthundhi. Andhuke nenu just 1month lo perfect English nerchukunanu. Meru kuda speak X app ni download chesukondi, Zero nunchi hero ayipondi! [Speaker A: Only give five star rating. Speaker B: Can you give me a five star rating? Speaker A: That's how you should say it. You must be wondering who this Rapido guy is talking to. You can only learn English when you practice on your own. I am learning English on the Speak X app. There should be someone to point out our mistakes, right? That's why after my work is complete, I learn English through an AI teacher on the Speak X app. Speak X helps you a lot in learning English. Because here, the AI teacher doesn't judge us, and it also corrects our mistakes. That's why I learned perfect English in just 1 month. Why wait? You also download the Speak X app and go from zero to hero!]
on_screen_text:
Only give five star rating
Can you give me a five star rating?
Ani cheppali [That's how to say it]
Meru eppudu alochisthunaru kadha [You are thinking now, right]
E rapido vadu matladuthundo aanesi [Who this Rapido guy is talking to]
English meeru aapudey nechukogalaru [You can learn English then only]
Yappud ayithe me aanthata mere practice cheygaltharo [When you practice on your own]
Nenu speak X app lo English nerchukuntupanu [I am learning English in Speak X app]
Mana mistakes cheppadaniki kuda yavro okati undali kadha [There should be someone to tell our mistakes too, right]
Aandhuke na work complete ayipoyina tharvatha [That's why after my work is completed]
Nenu speak X app lo [I, in Speak X app]
AI teacher dwara english nerchukuntunanu [learning English through AI teacher]
Speak X meku english nerchukovadaniki chala help chesthundhi [Speak X helps you a lot to learn English]
Endhukante ekada AI teacher manalani judge kuda cheyadhu [Because here AI teacher won't even judge us]
Aadhi mana mistakes ni kuda correct chesthundhi [It also corrects our mistakes]
Andhuke nenu just 1month lo perfect English nerchukunanu [That's why I learned perfect English in just 1 month]
Meru kuda speak X app ni download chesukondi [You also download Speak X app]
Zero nunchi hero ayipondi! [Become a hero from zero!]
summary: A Rapido driver explains how he practices English using the SpeakX app after work. He highlights that the AI teacher corrects his mistakes without judgment, helping him improve in one month. He urges viewers to download the app.
